Uses of Class
com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators.PolynomialEvaluation

  • Packages that use PolynomialEvaluation 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators  

    • Uses of PolynomialEvaluation in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators

      Subclasses of PolynomialEvaluation in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  DerivativePolynomialEvaluation
      Contains an evaluation of the derivative of a given order of a polynomial and the point where such derivative has been evaluated.
      class  DirectPolynomialEvaluation
      Contains an evaluation of a polynomial and the point where the polynomial has been evaluated.
      class  IntegralIntervalPolynomialEvaluation
      Contains an evaluation of an interval of the nth-integral of a polynomial.
      class  IntegralPolynomialEvaluation
      Contains an evaluation of the nth-integral of a polynomial and the point where such integral has been evaluated.
      Fields in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators with type parameters of type PolynomialEvaluation 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected List<PolynomialEvaluation> PolynomialRobustEstimator.mEvaluations
      Collection of polynomial evaluations and their corresponding point of evaluation used to determine a polynomial of required degree.
      protected List<PolynomialEvaluation> PolynomialEstimator.mEvaluations
      Collection of polynomial evaluations and their corresponding point of evaluation used to determine a polynomial of required degree.
      Methods in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators that return types with arguments of type PolynomialEvaluation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<PolynomialEvaluation> PolynomialRobustEstimator.getEvaluations()
      Gets collection of polynomial evaluations and their corresponding point of evaluation used to determine a polynomial of required degree.
      List<PolynomialEvaluation> PolynomialEstimator.getEvaluations()
      Gets collection of polynomial evaluations and their corresponding point of evaluation used to determine a polynomial of required degree.
      Methods in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators with parameters of type PolynomialEvaluation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected double PolynomialRobustEstimator.getAlgebraicDistance(PolynomialEvaluation eval, Polynomial polynomial)
      Computes algebraic distance between provided polynomial and evaluation.
      protected double PolynomialRobustEstimator.getDistance(PolynomialEvaluation eval, Polynomial polynomial)
      Computes geometric or algebraic distance between provided polynomial and evaluation.
      protected double PolynomialRobustEstimator.getGeometricOrAlgebraicDistance(PolynomialEvaluation eval, Polynomial polynomial)
      Comutes distance of evaluation respect to provided polynomial in a geometric sence if evaluation is direct, otherwise returns algebraic distance.
      Method parameters in com.irurueta.numerical.polynomials.estimators with type arguments of type PolynomialEvaluation 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static PolynomialRobustEstimator PolynomialRobustEstimator.create(int degree, List<PolynomialEvaluation> evaluations)
      Creates a robust polynomial estimator using provided degree, evaluations and default method.

      Creates an instance of a polynomial estimator using provided degree, polynomial evaluations and default type.

      Creates an instance of a polynomial estimator using provided degree, evaluations, listener and default type.

      Creates a robust polynomial estimator using provided evaluations and default method.

      Sets list of polynomial evaluations.

      Sets degree of polynomial to be estimated and collection of polynomial evaluations and their corresponding point of evaluation used to determine a polynomial of specified degree.

      Sets degree of polynomial to be estimated and collection of polynomial evaluations and their corresponding point of evaluation used to determine a polynomial of specified degree.
